type_definitions.name: TrackId
type_definitions.description: Value object for a track identifier. Currently imported directly by CLI in 25 files. After migration, the CLI will pass raw strings to usecase boundaries; usecase constructs TrackId internally. No change to domain implementation (OS-05).

type_definitions.name: CommitHash
type_definitions.description: Value object for a git commit hash string. Currently constructed by CLI and passed to usecase. After migration, usecase accepts raw Option<String> commit hash and constructs CommitHash internally. No change to domain implementation (OS-05).

type_definitions.name: CatalogueLintViolation
type_definitions.description: Domain value object produced when a CatalogueLinter rule fires. Used as the element type in Vec<CatalogueLintViolation> returned by RunCatalogueLint::execute (usecase application service). This is an intentional CN-01 exception accepted in spec.json IN-08: the usecase public API surface exposes this domain type because CLI callers access violations via type inference without a direct `use domain::...CatalogueLintViolation` import. No change to domain implementation (OS-05).

type_definitions.name: TrackReader
type_definitions.description: Domain trait for reading track data from persistent storage. Used as `&impl TrackReader` parameter type in the usecase function `reject_branchless_guard_by_str`. This is an intentional CN-01 exception accepted in spec.json IN-09: CLI callers pass a concrete `FsTrackStore` via type inference without any `use domain::...TrackReader` import; `cargo make check-layers` passes. A usecase-owned port abstraction was intentionally deferred. No change to domain implementation (OS-05).

type_definitions.name: TrackWriteError
type_definitions.description: Domain error enum surfaced by track write operations. Used as the error type in `Result<ActivateTrackOutcome, TrackWriteError>` returned by `ActivateTrackUseCase::execute_by_strings`. This is an intentional CN-01 exception accepted in spec.json IN-10: CLI callers pattern-match on the result without a direct `use domain::...TrackWriteError` import; `cargo make check-layers` passes. A usecase-owned error type was intentionally deferred. No change to domain implementation (OS-05).

type_definitions.name: TypeSignal
type_definitions.description: Per-type signal evaluation result produced by comparing a TypeCatalogueEntry against scanned code output. Modified during this track: a new `signal_as_str()` accessor was added so CLI display code can branch on signal level without importing domain::ConfidenceSignal (CN-01 compliance helper). No structural invariant change; all methods remain pure accessors. No change to domain implementation beyond this accessor addition.

informal_grounds.summary: signal_as_str() is a pure read-only accessor; value_object is the correct kind. action=modify because the method was added during this track (baseline predates the change, causing Group-3 red). Declaring it here moves it to Group-2 forward-check and suppresses the spurious baseline_changed_type red.

type_definitions.name: Decision
type_definitions.description: Domain enum for guard/hook Allow/Block decisions. Currently imported by CLI guard and hook commands. After migration, CLI sees only usecase-owned GuardDecision enum; domain::Decision stays internal to usecase/infrastructure. No change to domain implementation (OS-05).
